---

title: "List all VRMA animations for a VRM model"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List all VRMA animations for a VRM model"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/vrma"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve all VRMA animation entities associated with the specified VRM model.

  as={"h2"}
